# Support

The preferred support channel for Arcscord is Discord:

https://discord.gg/4geBanVWGR

Use Discord for:

- Installation help
- Usage questions
- Troubleshooting bot behavior
- Design feedback before opening a feature request
- Help narrowing down whether something is a bug

Use GitHub issues for:

- Reproducible bugs
- Feature requests with a clear use case
- Documentation problems
- Confirmed regressions

Do not use public GitHub issues or public Discord channels for security vulnerabilities. Follow [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).

When asking for help, include:

- The package you are using
- The package version
- Runtime and package manager versions
- A small code sample or reproduction
- The exact error message or unexpected behavior

Remove Discord tokens, webhook URLs, session cookies, private keys, and any other secrets before sharing logs or screenshots.
